Bug / Task Description: The enable-wins flag breaks its core guarantee: merging a replica that concurrently disabled the flag (empty dot set) clears a local enable dot, so a concurrent enable no longer wins over a concurrent disable. Both replicas converging to the same value still works in the simple case, so the defect only appears under a concurrent enable/disable.
Commit Subject: fix(crdt): enable-wins flag merge must not drop local enable dots
